/usr/bin/ar qc libchat_core.a CMakeFiles/chat_core.dir/chat_application.cc.o CMakeFiles/chat_core.dir/http/http_server.cc.o CMakeFiles/chat_core.dir/http/http_request.cc.o CMakeFiles/chat_core.dir/http/http_response.cc.o CMakeFiles/chat_core.dir/chat/user.cc.o CMakeFiles/chat_core.dir/utils/thread_pool.cc.o CMakeFiles/chat_core.dir/utils/logger.cc.o CMakeFiles/chat_core.dir/utils/work_stealing_thread_pool.cc.o CMakeFiles/chat_core.dir/utils/timer.cc.o CMakeFiles/chat_core.dir/db/database_manager.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libchat_core.a
